narrative:
Cols 58-I (precinct in Franklin County) has 788 registered voters, with 63.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 16.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.7%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.4 percentage points.
